key.name: display-inverted
key.summary: Show percentage as remaining (% left) instead of used
key.description: false (default): display X% used — 0% used when fresh, 100% used when exhausted. true: display X% left — 100% left when fresh, 0% left when exhausted.

key.name: panel-label-modes
key.summary: Which metrics to show in the panel (multi-select)
key.description: Options: overall, all, claude, codex. claude and codex can be combined. overall and all are exclusive. Fine-grained: claude-session, claude-weekly, codex-session, codex-weekly.
